summary: Schema 0.2 reconciliation is covered at the reviewed HEAD across managed/source PR-artifact synchronization and the existing regression paths.

judgment_delta: Initial concern: replacing probe-based PR-directory ownership detection could leave schema 0.2, legacy, or rollback routes insufficiently guarded.

Final judgment: pass. The new catalog-and-mirror schema 0.2 tests exercise both authorities without declaring the old probe Story and assert the copied PR artifact plus identical execution state; focused, targeted, reconciliation, and full-suite evidence are current at the reviewed HEAD.
